name: Stopwatch & Timer
description: Online stopwatch with lap recording & countdown timer with alarm. Free and easy to use.
keywords: online stopwatch, countdown timer, lap timer, online timer, stopwatch with laps, time tracker
howToUse: 1. Choose Stopwatch or Timer tab 2. Start/Pause/Reset 3. Record laps (stopwatch) or set time (timer)
faq: Q: Is it accurate? A: Yes, millisecond precision. Q: Works offline? A: Yes, browser-based.
